matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: verify successful login process module: authentication source pages: 3 preconditions: user credentials are valid. test data: username: testuser, password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter the username and password. 2. click on the login button. 3. verify that the user is logged in successfully. 4. verify that the token is generated and stored. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully, and the token should be generated and stored.

test case id: tc-authentication-002 title: verify failed login process module: authentication source pages: 3 preconditions: user credentials are invalid. test data: username: wronguser, password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. enter the username and password. 2. click on the login button. 3. verify that the login fails. expected result: the login attempt should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

test case id: tc-sharedpreference-008 title: verify shared preference retrieval with null input module: sharedpreference source pages: 2 preconditions: sharedpreference contains a null value. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. attempt to retrieve a null value from sharedpreference. 2. verify that the retrieval fails. expected result: the retrieval should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

test case id: tc-sharedpreference-002 title: verify shared preference retrieval failure module: sharedpreference source pages: 2 preconditions: sharedpreference is empty. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. attempt to retrieve text from sharedpreference. 2. verify that the retrieval fails. expected result: the retrieval should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

test case id: tc-sharedpreference-001 title: verify shared preference storage module: sharedpreference source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: text to store. test steps: 1. store the text in sharedpreference. 2. retrieve the text from sharedpreference. 3. verify that the text is correctly stored and retrieved. expected result: the text should be successfully stored and retrieved from sharedpreference.

test case id: tc-sharedpreference-007 title: verify shared preference storage with null input module: sharedpreference source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: null value. test steps: 1. attempt to store a null value in sharedpreference. 2. verify that the storage fails. expected result: the storage should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

test case id: tc-home-002 title: verify home screen display of curiositadelgiorno module: home source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. navigate to the home screen. 2. verify that the curiositadelgiorno is displayed. expected result: the curiositadelgiorno should be displayed on the home screen.

test case id: tc-home-005 title: verify home screen access to analisipianta module: home source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. navigate to the home screen. 2. click on the analisipianta option. 3. verify that the analisipianta page is displayed. expected result: the analisipianta page should be successfully loaded.

test case id: tc-home-006 title: verify home screen access to rilevatoremalattia module: home source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. navigate to the home screen. 2. click on the rilevatoremalattia option. 3. verify that the rilevatoremalattia page is displayed. expected result: the rilevatoremalattia page should be successfully loaded.

test case id: tc-home-001 title: verify home screen navigation to paginafunzione module: home source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. navigate to the home screen. 2. click on the paginafunzione option. 3. verify that the paginafunzione page is displayed. expected result: the paginafunzione page should be successfully loaded.

test case id: tc-home-004 title: verify home screen access to diario module: home source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. navigate to the home screen. 2. click on the diario option. 3. verify that the diario page is displayed. expected result: the diario page should be successfully loaded.

test case id: tc-fotocamera-001 title: verify camera functionality module: fotocamera source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. open the camera functionality. 2. take a photo. 3. verify that the photo is captured and associated with lemiepiante. 4. verify that the photo is also associated with verespeciedellepiantefotografate. expected result: the photo should be successfully captured and associated with both lemiepiante and verespeciedellepiantefotografate.

test case id: tc-geminiai-001 title: verify plant species identification module: gemini ai api source pages: 4 preconditions: user has taken a photo and uploaded it to the application. test data: a photo of a plant. test steps: 1. upload the photo to the application. 2. request species identification using the gemini ai api. 3. verify that the species is correctly identified. 4. store the identified species information in firebase storage. expected result: the plant species should be correctly identified, and the information should be stored in firebase storage.

test case id: tc-home-003 title: verify home screen access to lemiepiante module: home source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. navigate to the home screen. 2. click on the lemiepiante option. 3. verify that the lemiepiante page is displayed. expected result: the lemiepiante page should be successfully loaded.

test case id: tc-firebasestorage-001 title: verify personal storage path retrieval module: firebase storage source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. request the personal storage path from firebase storage. 2. verify that the personal storage path is returned. expected result: the personal storage path should be successfully retrieved.

test case id: tc-firebasestorage-002 title: verify photo retrieval from firebase storage module: firebase storage source pages: 5 preconditions: user has uploaded a photo to firebase storage. test data: a photo url. test steps: 1. request the photo url from firebase storage. 2. verify that the photo is downloaded and displayed. expected result: the photo should be successfully downloaded and displayed.

test case id: tc-datamanager-002 title: verify datamanager interaction with diary management use cases module: datamanager source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. perform an operation related to diary management (e.g., add a new entry). 2. verify that the datamanager processes the request and updates the database accordingly. expected result: the datamanager should process the request and update the database with the new diary entry.

test case id: tc-datamanager-001 title: verify datamanager interaction with plant management use cases module: datamanager source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: no specific input required. test steps: 1. perform an operation related to plant management (e.g., insert a new plant). 2. verify that the datamanager processes the request and updates the database accordingly. expected result: the datamanager should process the request and update the database with the new plant information.
